Interface IRasterType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster type.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E5EEA64C-91C9-4DCA-B16A-516AF8A0CA0B")]
public interface IRasterType

Properties

DefaultParameters

The collection of all variables associated with all item templates contained in the raster type.

IPropertySet DefaultParameters { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

FullName

The full name of the raster type object.

IName FullName { get; set; }

Property Value

IName

Examples

Sample Snippet

ItemTemplates

The collection of item templates associated with the raster type.

IItemTemplateArray ItemTemplates { get; set; }

Property Value

IItemTemplateArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

Overriding parameter values bound to function variables.

IPropertySet Parameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterBuilder

The inner raster builder associated with the raster type.

IRasterBuilder RasterBuilder { get; set; }

Property Value

IRasterBuilder

Examples

Sample Snippet

URIFilter

The active URI filter associated with the raster type.

IItemURIFilter URIFilter { get; set; }

Property Value

IItemURIFilter
